claim: Project subject: use Claude Science to discover a self-improving Agentic Loop (Claude Code drives Claude Science) and prove it beats a blank-CS baseline
Operator override: CS owns the whole critical path (capture→scoring→eval-prep→report→next); operator is A→B bridge; the auxiliary analysis agent is crash-fallback only, does not evaluate
Two loops distinguished: Experiment Loop (outer scientific-method cycle) vs Agentic Loop (inner product: CC drives CS)
A privacy incident during the exp-000 pilot (blank CC in the operator's logged-in Chrome could read personal chats) drove an account-privacy hard block and own-tab/own-project isolation
v7 loop content hash 6bbd94a13d13e462 (23 files); bootstrap-once→drive-many with isolated per-run CS workspaces
v8 loop content hash 331d802b219b4e69 (27 files) = v7 + OPT-1 context-composer + Codex multi-lens panel + Gate-2 figure add-on
v8 carries MORE THAN ONE upgrade over v7 (operator ruling): L7→L8 delta is the cumulative v8 bundle, NOT a single-variable isolation
v9 loop content hash c92973d8a3bbc5e9 (28 files) = v8 + Codex effort high/xhigh + hard multimodal Gate-2 + CS-reconnect doc; inherits v8 cumulative caveat
exp-001 design: baseline (B) vs loop (L=v7), 3 questions (Q_ERGO/Q2/Q3), 1 answer per cell, RCB block=question; two-key double-blind
exp-001 folder slug says 'v0-loop' but the loop under test was v7_cc-bootstrap (naming drift, pinned)
exp-001 primary endpoint (combined composite): mean within-question Δ(L−B) = +0.476, won 2/3 questions
exp-001 per-question Δ(L−B): Q_ERGO +0.421, Q2 -0.232, Q3 +1.24 (loss on Q2)
exp-001 human expert preferred the loop answer on Q_ERGO head-to-head (medium confidence); noted real novel insights (affinity differences, downstream sulfur-enzyme expression, CoQ ox/red readout)
exp-001 human critique: proposed pilots were overengineered/'not a pilot' — fed directly into the v8 pilot-design composer block
exp-002 design: 3 arms (B/L7/L8) × 3 questions (Q1 metabolite cocktail / Q2 why-aging / Q3 complex-I compound), 1 answer per cell, RCB block=question; two-key double-blind; scoring on claude-opus-4-8
exp-002 arm means, combined (DERIVED) 1-5: B 3.3011, L7 3.3315, L8 3.7118 — L8 highest
exp-002 arm means, human-expert mean-4: B 2.75, L7 2.6667, L8 3.25 — L8 highest
exp-002 PRIMARY ENDPOINT Δ(L8−L7) positive on 3/3 questions for ALL scorers: CS-composite +0.2753, CS-mean4 +0.1773, human +0.5833, combined +0.3803 (9/9 sign-positive)
exp-002 v7 did NOT reliably beat baseline: Δ(L7−B) CS-composite -0.1513 (1/3), human -0.0833 (1/3) — gain is v8-specific
exp-002 per-dimension: gains concentrate in creativity (CS Δ(L8−L7) +0.43 3/3; human +0.67 2/3) and human-scored reasoning (+1.00 3/3)

exp-002 CS grounding highest for baseline (B 2.33 > L8 1.67 > L7 1.00) — partly a UniProt/Ensembl resolver-coverage artifact, not fabrication (0 fabricated: 121/121 PMID, 112/112 DOI, 36/36 GEO certified)
exp-002 head-to-head (9 cells): v8 4 wins / baseline 4 / v7 1; Q2 (open-ended why-aging) won by baseline unanimously
exp-002 Friedman omnibus (n=3 blocks, underpowered by construction): CS-mean4 χ²=4.667 p=0.097; human p=0.264; combined p=0.368 — reported for completeness only
exp-002 CS↔human within-question top-pick agreement 3/3; Q2 full ranking identical; human scored ~1.3–1.8 pts below the LLM panel on reasoning/completeness/usefulness but stricter on creativity

exp-002 sharp divergence R8/E3 (baseline Q1): CS 4-dim mean 4.10 but human 1.50 + hallucination-flag ('cramped a few co-factors together') — shallow-but-formatted answer the rubric over-rewarded, the expert caught
exp-002 combined mean is a DERIVED per-dimension average of CS-panel and human scores over the 4 shared science dims — NOT a third scorer or an independent replicate

exp-003 design: SHOWCASE comparison (NOT scored), 2 arms B vs L9(v9), 1 shared question on the CD4+ T-cell Perturb-seq dataset, single-PDF output, DOI-only dataset pointer + compute-caution; byte-identical prompt to both arms
exp-003 arm B (baseline) answer: IMPDH2 → mycophenolic acid (Penicillium metabolite; prodrug mycophenolate mofetil) → type-2/eosinophilic asthma
exp-003 arm L9 (v9 loop) answer: PKM2 → micheliolide (feverfew guaianolide; covalent PKM2-Cys424 stabiliser; prodrug DMAMCL/ACT001) → multiple sclerosis
exp-003 L9 key stats AS REPORTED (not CS-verified): PKM knockdown GM-CSF z=-3.66 FDR=0.005, IFN-γ z=-3.3, IL-2 z=-0.05 (spared)

exp-003 divergence is the result: identical question+data → two defensible targets/diseases/natural-products; the v9 report carries more epistemic-hygiene scaffolding (belief-ledger, modality table, self-novelty-check, falsifiable-interaction pilot)
exp-003 NOT re-verified by CS: targets, effect sizes, and literature claims are as reported by each arm (no CS rubric scoring, no two-key blind, no human rubric pass)
exp-003 n=1 per arm, single question — a demonstration on one hard real-data problem, not a powered comparison
